name: EZPAWN
description_short: San Antonio, TX's EZPAWN pawn shop at 2612 S Presa St offers quick cash loans on items you own.
description_long:
EZPAWN's San Antonio location at 2612 S Presa St operates as a standalone pawn shop serving the local community. The shop is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturdays from 9 AM to 6 PM—giving San Antonio residents convenient access during weekdays and weekend mornings. This location brings fast cash options directly to the South Presa Street area of San Antonio.

At this San Antonio location, EZPAWN provides pawn loans, buy-sell-trade services, and other cash solutions on items such as electronics, jewelry, tools, and collectibles. Call +1 210-534-4999 to discuss your specific items, ask about current offers, or get details on the quick application process tailored to your needs.

If you need fast cash in San Antonio, TX, bring a valid ID and the items you'd like to pawn or sell to the Presa Street location. EZPAWN makes the process straightforward—no credit check required, and you can complete transactions the same day. The pawn shop serves all of San Antonio with accessible, no-hassle lending.
address: 2612 S Presa St, San Antonio, TX 78210

company_info.headquarters: 2612 S Presa St, San Antonio, TX 78210

pros: EZ+ Rewards program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and payments online from any device
Instant Quote tool provides estimated electronics value before visiting the store
Firearms loans and purchases available on-site with secure storage facility
Layaway requires only 10% down with monthly payment schedule
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below standard retail with daily new arrivals
Gold and diamond buying accepts any karat or weight with professional testing
Auto loans available at this location in addition to standard pawn services
cons: Pawn loan interest rates and fees are not published online—terms only available in-store
"Take Today" financing is subject to credit eligibility, not guaranteed for all customers
Sunday hours are limited to 12–5pm, significantly shorter than weekday availability
Online payment functionality is unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania (chain-level limitation)
No disclosed minimum or maximum loan amounts, making it hard to plan before visiting
best_for: Las Vegas residents needing same-day cash against electronics, jewelry, gold, or firearms
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned goods at steep discounts
Firearms owners who want collateral-based loans with secure on-site storage
Consumers who want layaway or installment options on secondhand merchandise without a credit check
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for Las Vegas consumers who need immediate cash against personal property—especially electronics, jewelry, gold, or firearms—and for bargain shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned goods with flexible payment options. The primary caveat is a lack of fee and rate transparency online: pawn loan costs are only disclosed in-store, making it impossible to compare the true cost of borrowing before walking in.
services: Online shop with daily new arrivals
Take Today third-party financing (up to 12+ months)
EZ+ Rewards program (points on pawn, sell, purchase, redeem)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, trade-up)
meta_description: EZPAWN at 2612 S Presa St, San Antonio, TX. Quick pawn loans and buy-sell-trade services with no credit check.
